full_text:
Xie Ci (Xiaozong) и¬қж…Ҳ (еӯқе®—)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Ci (и¬қж…Ҳ), styledXiaozong (еӯқе®—), was born in Pengcheng commandery. Taught many Wu princes, eventually killed by Sun Fen. Xie Ci was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
